name: Kohmak
description: Like the larger Kohm, this hand-shotgun doubles its volley with each successive shot.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Like the larger Kohm, this hand-shotgun doubles its volley with each successive shot.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tusk Heavy Gunners aiming into the ground sometimes with their grattler and not swapping back to it from their Kohmak when you put some distance between you.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.10
patchlogs.changes: Increased the accuracy of the Kohmak/Twin Kohmak.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.changes: •    Improved the firing/recoil animation of the Twin Kohmaks.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed minor reloading animation issues on the Kohmak.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes:
Doubling their volley on each successive shot, the Twin Kohmaks decimate foes in seconds. Find them in the Market today, or on Kela de Thaym!
·         Fixed the Kohmak muzzle flash always being default white.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed timing issues with the Kohmak reload animations.
